title: Nomad in Chiang Mai
description: There is some much things to love about Chiang Mai — the food, the culture, the people. Everyone just chilling out and enjoying life.
coverAlt: Wide green lawn under dramatic clouds with distant mountains near Chiang Mai

images.alt: Lush green lawn stretching toward tropical trees and misty mountains under a cloudy sky
images.caption: The view from a resort in Chiang Dow — its truly a place with nothing, but nature and tranquility

images.alt: A police officer holding a POS machine try to open a ticket.
images.caption: Caught by a police officer for not wearing a helmet while riding a scooter, 不嘻嘻
